title: Motions & Stuff
description: Inspired by "Actions and Stuff", refreshing Minecraft’s visuals and sounds
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4790d64c593d93a3d8512ab44a4ab647725511b_0.webp) ## About **Motions & Stuff** is a performance-friendly modpack inspired by Bedrock’s “*Actions and Stuff”*. It refreshes vanilla Minecraft’s visuals and sounds whilst leaving the core game untouched. This modpack is client side, so it works great for both solo and multiplayer. - 💫 Player and mob animations - 🎨 Refreshed textures and models - 🍂 New particles - 🔊 Sounds overhaul - ☁️ Better atmosphere and ambience - 🔧 Fully preconfigured mods, resourcepacks, and game settings
## Info
More Info QDAA is enabled by default, but you should disable it if you already use anti aliasing
